name: Limitation of Liability
text: Liability of the Parties shall be limited to the extent permitted under applicable law.

legal_basis.note: Compensation must reflect actual loss — supports caps
Penalty clause — courts award reasonable compensation only
B2B exceptions to consumer protection — liability caps valid

invalid_if: Liability is excluded for fraud or wilful misconduct
title: Limitation of Liability
dispute_hotspots: Whether consequential loss exclusion covers loss of profit — must be explicitly stated
Asymmetric caps in favour of one party — courts examine unconscionability
Consumer Protection Act overrides B2B caps when services are consumer-facing
